name: Cafe Holdings Inc.
summary: Cafe Holdings Inc., through its subsidiaries, owns and operates coffee shops in the United States and the United Kingdom. The company's stores sell proprietary coffee and related products, as well as complementary food and snacks. The company was formerly known as The Coffeesmiths Collective, Inc. and changed its name to Cafe Holdings Inc. in July 2020. Cafe Holdings Inc. is headquartered in Schaumburg, Illinois.
